required_skills: Relentless curiosity and passion for investment in the biopharma companies
multitask and manage tight timelines during long hours
understand and interpret scientific and medical publications and presentations
Strong proficiency in MS Excel and PowerPoint
education_requirements: Bachelor's degree in the life sciences and finance or related fields; Progress towards or willingness to participate in the CFA program; Ability and willingness to obtain FINRA licenses (SIE, Series 79)
